findings.title: Read-only reentrancy during Balancer exit transiently overvalues BPT collateral and lets attackers remove real collateral

best_agent_match.title: Collateral-disable checks can be bypassed under the transient LP mispricing, enabling withdrawal of real collateral

rejected_candidates.title: Balancer LP collateral can be massively overvalued through read-only reentrancy during pool exit
rejected_candidates.reason: Kept as part of F-001's root cause, but rejected as a standalone issue because the PoC does not separately demonstrate borrowing new assets during the reentrant window; the validated exploit uses the transient overvaluation to bypass collateral-disable checks and withdraw real collateral.
